input.title: Project Management Tool
input.description: Project Management Tool is a web-based enterprise platform that centralizes operational workflows, data visibility, and cross-functional reporting.

user_classes.Admin: Configures the system, manages users, and oversees permissions and settings.
user_classes.Manager: Oversees departmental workflows, approvals, KPIs, and operational reporting.
user_classes.Employee: Performs day-to-day operational tasks within assigned modules and permissions.
user_classes.User: Generic authenticated platform user with access limited by role and department.

definitions.Admin: System user with full administrative privileges.
definitions.Manager: Operational owner of a department, module, or workflow.
definitions.Employee: End user performing role-specific business operations.

constraints: Initial release will focus on the web platform only
Role-based access control is mandatory across all modules
Operational data must be auditable and retained according to policy

operating_environment.frontend: Web-based interface built with React and accessible through modern browsers.
operating_environment.backend: Service layer implemented with Node.js, MongoDB for business operations.
operating_environment.deployment: Cloud-hosted environment with centralized monitoring, backups, and automated deployments.

NFR-01.title: Security and Access Control
requirements: All sensitive data must be encrypted in transit and at rest
Role-based authorization must restrict access by module and action
All authentication events and privileged actions must be logged

NFR-02.title: Performance and Scalability
requirements: Core pages and dashboards should load within acceptable enterprise SLAs
The platform must support concurrent usage across multiple departments
Background jobs and reporting workloads should not block transactional workflows

NFR-03.title: Reliability and Recoverability
requirements: Automated backups must run on a defined schedule
Critical workflows should support retry-safe processing and audit logging
Operational alerts should be generated for failures and degraded services

system_attributes.reliability: Platform should provide resilient transactional processing with backup and recovery capabilities.
system_attributes.scalability: Architecture should support horizontal scaling for APIs, background workers, and reporting services.
system_attributes.security: Authentication, authorization, encryption, and auditability must be built into every module.
system_attributes.maintainability: Codebase should remain modular, observable, and safe to extend through clear service boundaries.

out_of_scope: Native mobile applications in the first release
Large third-party marketplace or legacy ERP migrations unless explicitly scoped
Non-core experimental modules outside the platform's operational workflows

FR-01.title: Project Creation and Setup
requirements: Create project with name, description, and team members
Set project start and end dates
Choose project methodology (Agile, Kanban, Waterfall)
Upload project documents and resources

FR-02.title: Task Management
requirements: Create tasks with title, description, assignee, and due date
Set task priority (low, medium, high, critical)
Organize tasks into columns (To Do, In Progress, Done)
Drag-and-drop task cards between columns

FR-03.title: Sprint Planning
requirements: Create sprints with start/end dates and goals
Add tasks to sprints from backlog
Sprint burndown chart showing progress
Sprint review with velocity metrics

FR-04.title: Team Collaboration
requirements: Comment on tasks with mentions
File attachments on tasks
Activity log showing all changes
Real-time updates when team members make changes

FR-05.title: Time Tracking
requirements: Log time spent on tasks
Start/stop timer for active work
Weekly timesheet view
Time reports per project and team member

FR-06.title: Gantt Chart View
requirements: Visual timeline of tasks and milestones
Task dependencies shown as connecting lines
Drag to adjust task dates
Critical path highlighting

FR-07.title: Reporting Dashboard
requirements: Project status overview with completion percentage
Team workload distribution chart
Overdue tasks report
Custom report builder with filters

FR-08.title: Role-Based Access Control
requirements: Admin, Manager, and Member roles
Admins can manage all projects and settings
Managers can create and assign tasks
Members can view and update their assigned tasks

FR-09.title: Integration with External Tools
requirements: Integrate with GitHub for commit linking
Slack notifications for task updates
Calendar sync for due dates
Webhook support for custom integrations

FR-10.title: Template System
requirements: Save project as template
Create project from existing template
Pre-built templates for common project types
Templates include task structure and settings

FR-01.title: Design Project Creation and Setup UI
FR-01.description: Design the user interface for project creation and setup. Create the screens, forms, dashboards, or status views needed by the SRS and make the workflow clear, responsive, and accessible for the target users.
acceptance_criteria: UI design for project creation and setup is complete and reviewable.
The project creation and setup design is responsive and accessible.
The design for project creation and setup aligns with the documented user flow and validation states.

FR-01.title: Frontend Implementation of Project Creation and Setup
FR-01.description: Implement the frontend behavior for project creation and setup. Build the required user interactions, validation states, loading states, and error handling so the interface supports these behaviors: Create project with name, description, and team members; Set project start and end dates; Choose project methodology (Agile, Kanban, Waterfall).
acceptance_criteria: Frontend implements the required project creation and setup user interactions.
Validation, loading, and error states for project creation and setup are handled in the UI.
Frontend behavior for project creation and setup is integrated correctly with backend APIs.

FR-01.title: Backend Implementation of Project Creation and Setup
FR-01.description: Implement the backend logic for project creation and setup. Build the required APIs, business rules, validation, permissions, persistence, and processing needed to support these behaviors: Create project with name, description, and team members; Set project start and end dates; Choose project methodology (Agile, Kanban, Waterfall).
acceptance_criteria: Backend logic for project creation and setup is implemented and testable.
APIs and business rules for project creation and setup enforce validation and security requirements.
Data handling for project creation and setup is reliable and supports the required workflow.

FR-01.title: Testing Project Creation and Setup Functionality
FR-01.description: Create and execute tests for project creation and setup. Cover the main success flows, failure scenarios, permission checks, validation rules, integrations, and operational edge cases described in the SRS so the implementation is safe to release.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover the main success and failure scenarios for project creation and setup.
Security, validation, and permission checks for project creation and setup are verified.
Regression coverage exists for the most important project creation and setup behaviors.
